title: Resonant Polarity Array for Asteroid Ore Scanning
strategies: arrow baseline: all +1 with -1 on the sub-diagonal, |det|=2^(N-1) (the minimum non-zero determinant, checker baseline)
seeded multi-restart random search: draw many ±1 matrices, keep the one with largest exact |det|
structured optimum: Sylvester–Hadamard for power-of-two N and Paley type-I for N=q+1 (q prime, q=3 mod 4), attaining |det|=N^(N/2) exactly
local sign-flip hill climbing on |det| starting from a structured or random array
